allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./src/data/products.json'\); console.log\('Total:', p.products.length\); console.log\('First IDs:', p.products.slice\(0,5\).map\(x => x.id\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./src/data/products.json'\); const last = p.products[p.products.length-1]; console.log\('Last product:', JSON.stringify\(last, null, 2\).slice\(0, 500\)\); console.log\('Keys in root:', Object.keys\(p\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const content = fs.readFileSync\('./src/data/products.json', 'utf8'\); const lastLines = content.split\('\\n'\).slice\(-20\).join\('\\n'\); console.log\(lastLines\);")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./src/data/products.json'\); const b3 = p.products.find\(x => x.id === '1000'\); const b6 = p.products.find\(x => x.id === '1001'\); console.log\('bundle-3:', b3?.title, b3?.price\); console.log\('bundle-6:', b6?.title, b6?.price\);")
